chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3728 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "يَا مَعْشَرَ اَلتُّجَّارِ اِرْفَعُوا رُءُوسَكُمْ فَقَدْ وَضَحَ لَكُمُ اَلطَّرِيقُ تُبْعَثُونَ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ فُجَّاراً إِلاَّ مَنْ صَدَقَ حَدِيثُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3728 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"O group of traders, raise your heads, for the path has been made clear for you. You will be resurrected on the Day of Judgment as transgressors, except those who speak the truth."
